THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNTER, DONNA CUAGO, EVA AKA MINERVA M. CUAGO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 431 CHENERY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL MAY-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, AS PER AGREEMENT, PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS & DAMAGES, ATNY FEES & COSTS AS TO BOTH DEFTS. DEFT CUAGO WAIVES ANY CLAIM TO ANY SECURITY DEPOSIT NOW HELD BY PLTF; DEFT HUNTER WAIVES $1400 SEC DEPOSIT HELD BY PLTF. IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY, PLTF WILL DISM W/PREJUDICE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES.
